bird.name: Palawan frogmouth
bird.summary: The Palawan frogmouth (Batrachostomus chaseni) is a species of bird in the family Podargidae. It is found on Palawan in the Philippines.

locations.name: Iwahig Prison and Penal Farm
locations.summary: Iwahig Prison and Penal Farm in Puerto Princesa, Palawan, Philippines is one of seven operating units of the Bureau of…

relations.subject: Palawan frogmouth
relations.evidence: It occurs in just one protected area in the Iwahig Prison and Penal Farm

relations.subject: Palawan frogmouth
relations.evidence: However, Palawan's forests are under threat due to illegal logging, deforestation and mining and it is reasonable to believe that this bird's population is declining
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
